{ "name": "league/flysystem-ftp", "description": "FTP filesystem adapter for Flysystem.", "keywords": ["filesystem", "flysystem", "ftp", "ftpd", "files", "file"], "minimum-stability": "dev", "prefer-stable": true, "autoload": { "psr-4": { "League\\Flysystem\\Ftp\\": "" } }, "require": { "php": "^8.0.2", "ext-ftp": "*", "league/flysystem": "^3.0.0", "league/mime-type-detection": "^1.0.0" }, "license": "MIT", "authors": [ { "name": "Frank de Jonge", "email": "info@frankdejonge.nl" } ] }
